seo.title: Minu's Bakery | Artisanal Bakery & Patisserie in Paldi, Ahmedabad
seo.description: Minu's Bakery in Paldi, Ahmedabad offers fresh artisanal croissants, sourdough breads, and custom celebration cakes baked daily with organic ingredients. Order online or visit us today.
seo.keywords: bakery Ahmedabad, Paldi bakery, custom cakes Ahmedabad, sourdough bread, croissants, Minu's Bakery
seo.og_title: Minu's Bakery | Artisanal Bakery & Patisserie in Paldi, Ahmedabad
seo.og_description: Fresh artisanal croissants, sourdough breads, and custom celebration cakes baked daily with organic ingredients. Order online or visit us today.
seo.twitter_description: Fresh artisanal croissants, sourdough breads, and custom celebration cakes baked daily in Paldi, Ahmedabad.

hero.description: Hand-rolled croissants, customized cloud cakes, and organic sourdough made daily with slow fermentation and local dairy. Experience minimal pastry magic.

about.paragraph1: It began with a single wooden spoon, a recipe book inherited from her grandmother, and a relentless curiosity for flour hydration. Today, Minu's Bakery is a sanctuary for those who appreciate the patience of wild sourdough yeast and the flawless layers of premium pasture-butter laminated pastry.
about.paragraph2: We never take shortcuts. No synthetic additives, no commercial volume-enhancers. Just local milk, freshly crushed herbs, single-origin cacao, and plenty of time.
about.feature1_desc: Sourced directly from ecological crop co-ops.
about.feature2_desc: Slow rising process yields exceptionally airy pastry layers.

menu.name: Classic Butter Croissant
menu.description: 72-hour laminated French pastry dough featuring organic butter, resulting in unmatched lightness.

menu.name: Country Sourdough Boule
menu.description: Stoneground wholewheat flour, naturally fermented for 36 hours. Beautiful golden caramelized blister crust.

menu.name: Pain au Chocolat
menu.description: Two sleek rods of single-origin 70% dark Belgian chocolate enveloped in a fluffy, flaky pastry quilt.

menu.name: Pistachio Rose Cake
menu.description: Rich roasted Sicilian pistachio paste sponge layered with organic rosewater cream and culinary-grade rose petals.

menu.name: Kalamata Olive Sourdough
menu.description: Moist open-crumb sourdough embedded with crushed Kalamata olives, toasted rosemary sprigs, and flaky sea salt.

menu.name: Belgian Fudge Cloud Cake
menu.description: Decadent chocolate gateau with airy mascarpone frosting cream layers, dusted with raw Dutch cocoa powder.

testimonials.quote: The texture of Minu's croissants takes me back to Paris. Absolutely perfect layers, incredible golden crust, and they stay incredibly fluffy. My Saturday morning ritual!
testimonials.author: Sophia Laurent, Pastry Lover

testimonials.quote: Designed our wedding cake using her interactive tool and consulted the team. The pistachio rose water cake was incredibly damp, complex, and looked minimal & exquisite.
testimonials.author: Julian Vance, Architect

testimonials.quote: Her Wild Yeast Sourdough actually changed my digestion and morning toast routine. Unmatched tanginess, beautiful airy crumb hole-pattern, and crust is incredibly rustic.
testimonials.author: Dr. Eleanor Rose, Nutritionist

contact.heading: Visit Our Kitchen or Order Custom
contact.description: Stop by to smell the hot country ovens, pick up fresh morning bread, or request a catered consultation for corporate pastry packs or events.
contact.hours_line1: Tuesday – Saturday: 07:00 AM – 02:00 PM (Or sold out)
contact.hours_line2: Sunday – Monday: Rest and recipe testing
contact.whatsapp_message: Hi Minu's Bakery, I have an enquiry!

footer.tagline: A beautiful minimal bakery focusing on traditional baking methods, slow fermentation, and customized premium design cakes.
footer.promise_quote: Every flour grain, every gram of local butter, every drop of milk, and every single second of cold proof is respected. This is my commitment to your table.
